title: Autopsy Assistant Mission and Vision
content:
Autopsy Assistant Mission and Vision

MISSION

To train technical staff in forensic cases, who perform autopsy, take and send postmortem (post-death) samples, work in forensic pathology laboratories, write forensic reports, know crime scene investigation procedures and assist Forensic Medicine specialists.

VISION

To train technicians who are knowledgeable in the fields of anatomy, physiology, histology, biochemistry, general pathology, know all the procedures in autopsy, have the knowledge / skills to perform the necessary procedures, have crime scene and review information, and know the quality control and assurance in autopsy units.
